urdu transliteration text:
”Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana”
-
english translation text: Please recite a Surah Fateha for the Marhumeen of all who made this translation possible

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana
O Karbala don't ever forget Hussain's sorrow
(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World

urdu transliteration text:
Inn Rait Ke Urte Huwe Zarraat Se Kehna
Say to these flying sand particles
(Asgher Ki Yehi Qabr Hai) Usko Na Mitanaa
english translation text: This is Asghar's grave , don't obscure it

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana
O Karbala don't ever forget Hussain's sorrow
(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World

urdu transliteration text:
Khaymese Nange Paaun Chali Kis Tarha Zainab
(Ye Baat Alamdaar Ko) Hargiz Na Batanaa
english translation text:
How did Zainab walk bare feet from the tent
Don't ever tell this to The Standard Bearer

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana
O Karbala don't ever forget Hussain's sorrow
(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World

urdu transliteration text:
Tujh Ko Kya Hai Kerbobalaa Kis Ne Muallaa
(Ye Khuun Hai Rasuul Ka) Isko Na Chupanaa
english translation text:
Karbala, who has Elevated your Status
This is the Prophet's blood, don't ever conceal it

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana
O Karbala don't ever forget Hussain's sorrow
(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World

urdu transliteration text:
Ay Chaand Sitaaro Ali Akber Ki Shahadaat
O Moon and Stars, Ali Akbar's martyrdom
(Sughraa Ko Na Rasuul Ke)  Rauzepe Sunanaa
english translation text: Don't convey it to Sughra at Prophet's tomb

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana
O Karbala don't ever forget Hussain's sorrow
(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World

urdu transliteration text:
Nehre Furaat Ki Ye Taraptii Huwi Mawje
These trembling waves of river Euphrates
(Abbas E Alamdaar Ko) Surat Na Dikhanaa
english translation text: Don't (be audacious) to show face to Abbas the Standard Bearer

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana
O Karbala don't ever forget Hussain's sorrow
(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World

urdu transliteration text:
Pyaasa Hay Teen Roz Ka Nanha Ali Asgher
Infant Ali Asghar is thirsty for three days
(Paani Ke Ewaz Teerse) Isko Na Sulanaa
english translation text: Don't put him to sleep with an arrow, in lieu of some water

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana
O Karbala don't ever forget Hussain's sorrow
(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World

urdu transliteration text:
Dekho To Zaraa Ghor Se Akber Ko Laaeeno
Look closely to Akbar, O accursed people
(Hamshakl Hai Rasuul Ka) Barchi Na Laganaa
english translation text: He is the Prophet's Resemblance, don't poke spears at him

urdu transliteration text:
Aye Kerbala Hussein Ke Gham Ko Na Bhulaana

(Warna Tujhe Bhi Saraa) Bhulaa Dega Zamanaa
english translation text: Else, you too will be forgotten with the World
